stemHtml: After departure as a special VFR flight, what happens as you approach the control zone boundary?

options.a: ATC will clear you to exit the control zone following established procedures.
options.b: Report passing the boundary and state "CANCELLING SPECIAL VFR".
options.c: Broadcast your position and in-flight visibility on the current frequency.
options.d: You may automatically contact the next ATC unit.
